model_patch.spinec/Spinec/src/main/cpp/thirdparty/st:
Looking at the code, the issue is that when both the SSE2 runtime check and the STBI_NEON compile-time define are present, the NEON block overwrites the values set in the SSE2 block. Since both blocks assign the same values (`stbi__idct_simd`, etc.), the first assignment is redundant.

The fix is to use `#elif` to make the assignments mutually exclusive.
```diff
--- a/spinec/Spinec/src/main/cpp/thirdparty/stb/stb_image.h
+++ b/spinec/Spinec/src/main/cpp/thirdparty/stb/stb_image.h
@@ -3054,7 +3054,7 @@ static void stbi__setup_jpeg(jpeg *j)
       j->resample_row_hv_2_kernel = stbi__resample_row_hv_2_simd;
    }
 #endif
-
+#ifndef STBI_NEON
 #ifdef STBI_NEON
    j->idct_block_kernel = stbi__idct_simd;
```
